AI Tool Finder
Categories All Tools Compare

All AI Tools

  • ChatGPT — The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.
  • Gemini — Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.
  • Claude — An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.
  • Perplexity — An AI-powered answer engine that cites sources for every response.
  • Jasper — An AI writing platform built for marketing teams and brand-consistent content.
  • Copy.ai — AI copywriting tool focused on marketing content and workflow automation.
  • Grammarly — AI-powered grammar, tone, and clarity checker with a generative writing assistant.
  • Midjourney — One of the most popular AI image generators, known for highly artistic, polished output.
  • DALL-E — OpenAI's image generator, built directly into ChatGPT.
  • Leonardo AI — AI image generation platform popular with game artists and designers.
  • Runway — Professional-grade AI video generation and editing suite.
  • CapCut — Free AI-powered video editor popular for short-form social content.
  • ElevenLabs — AI text-to-speech and voice cloning known for highly realistic voices.
  • Murf AI — AI voiceover platform aimed at presentations, e-learning, and marketing videos.
  • GitHub Copilot — AI pair programmer that autocompletes and explains code inside your editor.
  • Cursor — An AI-first code editor built around chat, autocomplete, and codebase-aware edits.
  • Notion AI — AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.
  • Otter.ai — AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items.

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
